title: Document Assembly and Export
description: Implement document assembly that collects approved/locked sections from a project, assembles them into a formatted document with heading hierarchy, auto-generated table of contents, and section numbering. Provide HTML preview in the SPA and export endpoints for PDF and DOCX using the project's docs utility (tools/utils/docs.mjs). Frontend adds Preview Document button to project detail and export buttons to the preview view.
designContext: Use tools/utils/docs.mjs for PDF (createPdf) and DOCX (createDocx) generation -- these are pre-approved utilities. Use renderMarkdown from docs.mjs for server-side markdown-to-HTML conversion for the assembly endpoint. Assembly collects sections sorted by order, renders each section's markdown content, adds section numbering and heading hierarchy. The /api/v1/projects/:id/assemble endpoint returns rendered HTML. The /api/v1/projects/:id/export/:format endpoint returns file download. Frontend preview view shows the assembled HTML and provides download buttons.
